name: mae
description: mae (Managed Agentic Engineering) for OpenAI Codex CLI — a spec-driven, human-gated development workflow: init/start/finish/fix, project scaffolding, and self-maintaining docs.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven, human-gated init/start/finish/fix workflow for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use mae to drive feature and bug work through a spec-driven, human-gated workflow: bootstrap or adopt a project, start a feature (interview → spec → plan), finish it (review → quality gate → PR), and fix bugs (reproduce → failing test → smallest fix).
defaultPrompt: I've got a feature I'd like to build.
Let's set up this project with mae.
